title: Create: Clayworks Compatibility
description: Adds recipes to ensure all Clayworks items can be made using Create's machines.
body:
## Overview
Bridge the gap between Create and Clayworks content mods. This data pack adds recipes to allow using Create machines to craft Clayworks blocks that otherwise don't have a Create recipe.

## Recipes added
### Bulk washing (Encased fan + water)

- Concrete (1 concrete powder -> 1 concrete)

### Shaped crafting (Mechanical crafter)

- Dyed decorated pots (4 bricks + 1 dye)

### Deploying

- Dye onto decorated pots

## Installation
Save the downloaded data pack .zip file to the `datapacks` folder of your world. If the world is live, use the command `/reload` to load it in. For more details check out the [documentation here](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Data_pack?so=search#Usage).

## Compatibility
Currently tested for 1.20.1 only, though very much open to expanding that range wherever Create and Clayworks can be applied. Feel free to get in touch via the Github [issues page](https://github.com/villainous-j/create-clayworks-compatibility-datapack/issues) if you have any requests!
